symptoms.symptom_name: Vulval itch/burn + thick white non-malodorous 'cottage-cheese' discharge, post-antibiotic

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Itch-predominant symptoms with a thick white non-malodorous discharge after antibiotics are characteristic of candidiasis.
Absence of a thin grey fishy-smelling discharge argues against bacterial vaginosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: No PID/STI features (no fever/deep pain/abnormal bleeding/malodorous-frothy discharge)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever/deep pelvic pain/abnormal bleeding lowers the probability of PID.
Absence of a frothy malodorous discharge and STI-risk features lowers the probability of trichomoniasis/STI.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Clinical diagnosis for typical candidiasis; treat empirically.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Vaginal swab / STI screen / pregnancy test / glucose
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: If atypical/recurrent/STI-risk, to confirm pregnancy (drug choice) or find an underlying cause.
